topIndia.title: Chipmaker Kioxia ships next-gen memory samples as AI boom fuels dramatic comeback
topIndia.summary: The growth of AI has fueled a remarkable ​turnaround for Kioxia, which was previously seen as an example of Japan's chipmaking struggles but whose stock price has surged more than sevenfold this year to a market capitalisation over $250 billion, exceeding Toyota Motor's.

events.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
events.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

events.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
events.summary: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

events.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
events.summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

events.title: Microsoft launches firm to help companies adopt AI with $2.5 billion
events.summary: Microsoft has launched a new venture, Microsoft Frontier Company, backed by $2.5 billion, to guide businesses in selecting and integrating AI technologies. This move acknowledges that large corporations are increasingly opting for a mix of AI tools, including open-source optio…
